hooks.command: if [ -z "$REMOTE_CONTAINERS" ]; then echo 'BLOCKED: This project requires the devcontainer. Please reopen in the devcontainer before using Claude Code.'; exit 2; fi; if [ "$SSH_AUTH_SOCK" != "/tmp/ssh-agent.sock" &&  -n "$SSH_AUTH_SOCK" ]; then echo 'BLOCKED: SSH_AUTH_SOCK is set — agent forwarding must be disabled in the devcontainer.'; exit 2; fi
